label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking if following these instructions will bring me back to the starting point. The instructions are: Take 7 steps. Turn around. Take 7 steps. The options are Yes or No. First, I need to break down each step and visualize the movement. Let's assume I'm facing a certain direction when I start. Let's say I start facing north. I take 7 steps forward, so I move 7 steps north. Then I turn around, which means I turn 180 degrees, so now I'm facing south. Then I take 7 steps forward again. Since I'm facing south, those 7 steps would take me 7 steps south. If I started at point A, moved 7 steps north to point B, then turned around and moved 7 steps south,
